pricing_strategy.note: ヴィンテージ(1999-2001)は希少性高く強気OK。新弾は競合多いため相場の3%下。

ai_prompt_hint: This is a One Piece card from Japan, likely a vintage Carddass by Bandai (1999-2001) or modern One Piece Card Game. Focus on: Holo/Prism type, year/series, character name, rarity (SR/SEC/Alt Art), and Bandai branding. Title must include 'One Piece' and 'Japanese'. For vintage cards, emphasize 'Carddass' and 'Bandai'. Never use Pokemon or Ohtani related words.
